title: Add final loop variable assignment when unrolling for-loops

features.name: integer loop variable in for-loop unrolling
features.description: Code should include a for-loop with an explicitly declared integer variable as the loop iterator, which the synthesis tool must unroll

features.name: post-loop reference to loop variable
features.description: Code should include a reference to the loop variable after the for-loop exits, where the variable should hold its final value that failed the loop condition
